methodology.correctnessMetric: Exact expected-token recall proxy: verifies requested evidence-token recovery, not continuation quality, false-positive rate, or hallucination rate.
methodology.policy: Append messages byte-stably until the next projected chunk crosses the configured high-water mark, then install a deterministic oracle durable-state summary.
methodology.compactionSummary: Oracle-generated from scenario ground truth; summary-model calls were not made or timed.

stable45kWithMiniMax512.composition: 45K high-water for all models; MiniMax max_tokens=512; other model budgets unchanged.

stable60kWithMiniMax512.composition: 60K high-water for all models; MiniMax max_tokens=512; other model budgets unchanged.

routeAwareHybrid.validationStatus: Post-hoc composition of live route runs; independent interleaved confirmation is still required.
routeAwareHybrid.selectionBasis: Substitute only routes that retained 6/6 correctness, had zero length finishes, and did not regress scenario p95 versus the uniform 60K candidate.

stable45k.scope: Ministral 14B and GLM-4.7; every warm turn reported input and cached tokens.

stable60k.scope: Ministral 14B and GLM-4.7; every warm turn reported input and cached tokens.

stable75kReference.scope: Ministral 14B and GLM-4.7 from the parent campaign; every warm turn reported input and cached tokens.
